zh.Ashby, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Gournay V於大約1148年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Hughes de Gournay59歲，母親Mélisende de Coucy30歲。他於1182年與Juliana Dammartin在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1215年登記服兵役。他去世於1215年10月25日在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gournay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gourley  .

variants.name: Gourley
meanings: Scottish: possibly a Norman habitational name from North or South Gorley (Hampshire), or an unidentified place in Normandy, France.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Gournay V was born about 1148, in Norfolk, England, his father, Hughes de Gournay, was 59 and his mother, Mélisende de Coucy, was 30. He married Juliana Dammartin in 1182, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1215. He died on 25 October 1215, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Abbey, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Gournay V est né environ 1148, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Hughes de Gournay, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Mélisende de Coucy, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Dammartin en 1182, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1215. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1215, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Abbey, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Gournay V um 1148 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hughes de Gournay 59 und seine Mutter Mélisende de Coucy 30. Er hat 1182 in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England Juliana Dammartin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1215 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1215 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Abbey, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Juliana Dammartin nel 1182, nel Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1215. Morì il 25 ottobre 1215, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbey, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Gournay Vが約1148年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Hughes de Gournayは59歳，母Mélisende de Coucyは30歳であった。1182年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチでJuliana Dammartinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1215年に兵役登録をした。彼は1215年10月25日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンアビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Gournay V(이)가 대략 1148년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hughes de Gournay(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Mélisende de Coucy(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1182년 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치에서 Juliana Dammartin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1215년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1215년 10월 25일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Gournay V nasceu aproximadamente 1148, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hughes de Gournay, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Mélisende de Coucy, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Dammartin em 1182, em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1215. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1215, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbey, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Gournay V родился около 1148 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Hughes de Gournay было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Mélisende de Coucy, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Dammartin в 1182 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1215 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 25 октября 1215 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности эбби, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Gournay V nació aproximadamente 1148, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hughes de Gournay, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Mélisende de Coucy, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Juliana Dammartin en 1182, en Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1215. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1215, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Abbey, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
